name: Pond Race
author: Poki
description: Pond Race is a skill game where you have to get your frog across the pond by clicking on the lotus leaves. Be careful for obstacles along the way, like water snakes! Pond Race features a ton of levels for you to complete. How fast can you go across the pond?  About the creator: Pond Race was created by Gametapas. This is their second game on Poki after Conveyor Deli!
